steps.text:
Time to combine what you've learned. You're going to create
the project folder where you'll build your web app in Lessons 6-7.

Create this folder structure by hand:

    ~/claudzooks-project/
    ├── index.html
    ├── style.css
    └── notes.txt

steps.command: echo "This project was created during Claudzooks Lesson 5." > notes.txt

steps.text:
Open index.html in your browser to see it.
You should see a web page that says "Hello!" — you made that
with just terminal commands.

Now let's save where your project lives so the next lessons
can find it.
